falsification_conditions.condition: Price breaks above the 200-day moving average by 3% within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A breakout above this key resistance level would indicate a trend reversal, invalidating the 'HOLD' signal.
A blowoff score over 50 would confirm extreme overbought conditions, contradicting the current 'HOLD' and suggesting a imminent reversal.

falsification_conditions.condition: Price fails to reach 10% below the 2024 August bottom's low within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Failure to retest this critical support level would invalidate the pattern similarity to the 2024 bottom, undermining the 'HOLD' call.

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
